title: primula veris subsp. columnae
intro: Primula veris subsp. columnae, also known as the Columnae primrose, is a subspecies of the Primula veris plant, a type of flowering plant in the primrose family native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat coughs, colds, and sore throats. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Primula veris subsp. columnae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
